STS2MULTIPLAYERBALANCER-TEAM_DEATH_ENABL: If one hero dies, the whole team loses the run. Singleplayer behaves as vanilla.
STS2MULTIPLAYERBALANCER-FLANKING_NERF_EN: Flanking's multiplier is consumed after a single qualifying hit instead of lasting the whole turn.
STS2MULTIPLAYERBALANCER-KNOCKDOWN_NERF_E: Knockdown's multiplier is consumed after a single qualifying hit instead of lasting the whole turn.
STS2MULTIPLAYERBALANCER-ENEMY_DOUBLING_E: Doubles the enemy count in every non-boss encounter. Bosses are left unchanged.
